global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with various shapes and text elements promoting a travel booking service.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book their next trip with flexible options.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large, light green circular shape positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangular shape in light green, also centered within the ad.

elements.label: Small circular shape
elements.description: A small circular shape in light green, located towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Booking call to action
elements.description: A prominent text area at the bottom center with bold black text stating 'Book your next trip' and a smaller line below it.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Flexible booking options

elements.label: Reward price
elements.description: A bold text area at the bottom left displaying the price '$4.99' in black.

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: The logo 'WayPoint' in bold black text, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE' in bold black.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, key elements include a call to action and pricing.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, followed by a sale badge in the top right, with the main call to action and price at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: WayPoint, SALE, Book your next trip, Flexible booking options, $4.99, Claim reward
